basic_details.job_title: Assam Pollution Control Board Field Engineer Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Assam Pollution Control Board has released the official Field Engineer Notification 2026 on its official website. A total of 2 vacancies have been announced under the Assam Pollution Control Board Field Engineer Recruitment 2026. Eligible candidates possessing a B.E./B.Tech. in Environmental Engineering, Civil Engineering, Chemical Engineering, or an equivalent discipline from a recognized university, along with 2 to 3 years of relevant post-qualification experience in the environmental field, can apply through email mode up to 15-06-2026. The official notification PDF and application details

age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.education_qualification: B.E. / B. Tech. in Environmental Engineering / Civil Engineering / Chemical Engineering or equivalent discipline from a recognized university, Minimum 2 to 3 years of post-qualification work experience in the environmental field
qualification.details: Field Engineer: B.E. / B. Tech. in Environmental Engineering / Civil Engineering / Chemical Engineering or equivalent discipline from a recognized university. Minimum 2 to 3 years of post-qualification work experience in the environmental field is mandatory. Experience in environmental monitoring, pollution control, EIA, consent management, or related areas will be preferred. Candidates must be physically fit for field duties including site inspection and environmental sampling. Proficiency in computer operation and report writing is desirable.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for Assam Pollution Control Board Field Engineer Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
